{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144122D5B0A77B782866B62EBC"}"},"total":593},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7286758506009740068","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"确实，写的不错。作者描写的很细腻，语言写的也很朴实无华。对于某些细节的把控还是很到位的，确实是经过深思熟虑写出来的一篇文章。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1696582029,"group_id":"7103814512544844830","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"山有木兮木有枝，心悦君兮君不知","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N1Z4SAJxrXcvUe56BTo9pcc=","gender":2,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/02fd8faa267f4285b53a883d81f16a1d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776622925&x-signature=8Nw4yLs7vVBwevrHrhZhMfLqxaU%3D","user_id":"141187433119291","user_name":"木有知兮"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"141187433119291","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_2","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.2","title_id":"author_level_2"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.2","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.2"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7103814512544844830","book_info":{"abstract":"菜鸟警察陆元元奇葩的穿越了！什么？你问是怎么穿越的？
不想说，说就是被雷劈了！
真想骂一声贼老天！
可是……
“轰隆隆！咔嚓……”
行行行，我闭嘴！你是老天你最大！
穿越就穿越吧！既来之则安之！
可别人穿越不是系统，就是空间，要不就是皇后王妃，千金小姐，我咋就穿到了这缺吃少穿的灾荒年？
啥？我也有空间？
可这？
我缺的是肉，是米饭，不是菜啊！
陆元元忍不住哀嚎，我是食肉动物，不是牛啊！
好吧，空间鸡肋，异能鸡肋，也难不倒我，空中霸主，丛林之王，国宝，马王，都是我的坐骑，看穿越萌新怎么带着族人隐居深山，从无到有，创造生活，收获幸福！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ac8422577196bc0d86d289ab0fc835b9","author":"陌上玉人来","author_id":"","book_id":"7103814512544844830","book_name":"灾年不逃荒，我带着族人深山求生","book_short_name":"满满元气","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#c0b8c8","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"7939人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":23,"name":"种田","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=23&name=种田&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":5,"name":"古代言情","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=5&name=古代言情&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":44,"name":"空间","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=44&name=空间&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":463,"name":"今穿古","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=463&name=今穿古&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":557,"name":"逃荒","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=557&name=逃荒&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7106534227977765417","read_count":"7939","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2931551"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"1171","tags":"种田,古代言情,穿越,空间,今穿古,逃荒","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/fd4663ee4d5ad4b3f9cba348541ad3f0~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779259283&x-signature=Vbv2qoHbMtNopdNJG%2BnSCABi7f8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"103732408868","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"1.33673e+07"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321144122D5B0A77B782866B62EBC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"
